name: Restaurants
example: Track menu QR codes, table tents, local flyers, and seasonal offers.

name: Real Estate
example: Track property signs, open house flyers, agent cards, and listing pages.

name: Ecommerce
example: Track product pages, collections, bundles, coupons, and seasonal sales.

name: SaaS
example: Track demo campaigns, webinars, onboarding pages, and launch announcements.

name: Agencies
example: Track client deliverables across ads, email, social, QR, affiliates, and partners.

name: Healthcare
example: Track appointment pages, local flyers, event booths, and educational resources.

name: Education
example: Track open days, admissions campaigns, course pages, and student events.

name: Nonprofits
example: Track fundraising emails, event flyers, volunteer pages, and partner appeals.

name: Fitness
example: Track gym promotions, class schedules, influencer posts, and referral offers.

name: B2B Companies
example: Track webinars, whitepapers, case studies, demos, and conference campaigns.
